children.heading: .—Individual Assignment of Members Without Dependents
children.label: a .—Individual Assignment of Members Without Dependents

children.text: To the extent that the Secretary concerned determines that military family housing constructed and leased under is not needed to house members of the armed forces eligible for assignment to military family housing, the Secretary may assign, without rental charge, members without dependents to the housing.section 2835 of this title
A member without dependents who is assigned to housing pursuant to paragraph (1) shall be considered to be assigned to quarters pursuant to .section 403(e) of title 37

children.heading: .—Conversion to Long-Term Leasing of Military Unaccompanied Housing
children.label: b .—Conversion to Long-Term Leasing of Military Unaccompanied Housing

children.text: If the Secretary concerned determines that military family housing constructed and leased under is excess to the long-term needs of the family housing program of the Secretary, the Secretary may convert the lease contract entered into under subsection (a) of such section into a long-term lease of military unaccompanied housing.section 2835 of this title

The term of the lease contract for military unaccompanied housing converted from military family housing under paragraph (1) may not exceed the remaining term of the lease contract for the family housing so converted.

children.heading: .—Notice and Wait Requirements
children.label: c .—Notice and Wait Requirements
children.text: The Secretary concerned may not convert military family housing to military unaccompanied housing under subsection (b) until after the end of the 14-day period beginning on the date on which the Secretary submits, in an electronic medium pursuant to , to the appropriate committees of Congress a notice of the intent to undertake the conversion.section 480 of this title

children.heading: .—Application to Housing Leased Under Former Authority
children.label: d .—Application to Housing Leased Under Former Authority
children.text: This section also shall apply to housing initially acquired or constructed under the former (commonly known as the “Build to Lease program”), as added by section 801 of the Military Construction Authorization Act, 1984 (; 97 Stat 782).section 2828(g) of this titlePublic Law 98–115
